{{Infobox technique
| name = Steelborn body
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Steelborn body Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Steelborn [[Iron body]] is a specialized type of physical foundation achieved during the advancement to the [[Iron]] realm. It is characterized by its immense capacity for physical power, which becomes particularly dominant once a user reaches the [[Underlord]] stage. This specific body type is known for its ability to grow and sharpen in effectiveness as the user progresses through higher stages of cultivation. It functions by drawing [[madra]] into the muscles and skin to fuel explosive strength, such as enabling high-speed movement or massive physical strikes. However, it is not primarily designed for protection; users must continuously supply it with [[madra]] to maintain their physical integrity and prevent injury. While it provides overwhelming strength that can rival or exceed other specialized bodies, its heavy reliance on [[madra]] consumption means it can drain a user's reserves rapidly during intense combat.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Steelborn body]] is an [[Iron body]] that provides immense brute strength once the user reaches [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Steelborn [[Iron body]] is a type of body [[Enforcement]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Steelborn [[Iron body]] is a technique [[Yerin]] draws on.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Steelborn [[Iron body]] is a physical enhancement used by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The Steelborn [[Iron body]] is a physical attribute of [[Yerin]] that provides overwhelming strength at the [[Underlord]] stage.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] flows [[madra]] through her Steelborn [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] has a Steelborn [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses her Steelborn [[Iron body]] to kick off with great power.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]] developed a copy of [[Yerin]]'s Steelborn [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] sent [[madra]] into her Steelborn [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] can cycle her [[madra]] to her Steelborn [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Steelborn [[Iron body]] gives [[Yerin]] great capacity for strength compared to other [[Heralds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] pushed her Steelborn [[Iron body]] to its limits.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
